hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -iE '(note|priority|compass|todo)' > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '[Claude Edit] 🔵 Updating priorities - Apple Note will be synced on session end' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.prompt // empty' 2>/dev/null | grep -iE '(add priority|remove priority|sync note)' > /dev/null && echo '[Claude Monitor] 🎯 Priority sync detected - will update Apple Note' || true
